seo.description: Marquis Evander is a Software Engineer from Indonesia specializing in full-stack development, scalable backend systems, DevOps, cybersecurity, automation, and system architecture.
seo.socialDescription: Software Engineer building scalable applications, high-performance APIs, infrastructure, and security automation.

hero.description: I build scalable full-stack applications and backend systems with a focus on high-performance APIs, infrastructure, deployment, automation, cybersecurity, and maintainable architecture.

about.title: Code. Build. Scale.
about.intro: I am a Software Engineer from Indonesia focused on full-stack development and scalable frontend and backend architecture.
about.description: I engineer backend systems with Golang, Python, PHP, and Node.js; design REST APIs, microservices, and service-oriented systems; optimize databases and caching; automate DevOps workflows; and build defensive security and Android automation tools.

capabilities.title: Fullstack Engineering
capabilities.description: Scalable frontend and backend architecture for clean, maintainable, production-ready applications.

capabilities.title: Backend Engineering
capabilities.description: High-performance APIs and backend systems using Golang, Python, PHP, and Node.js.

capabilities.title: DevOps & Automation
capabilities.description: CI/CD workflows, containers, cloud deployment, infrastructure, ADB, and task automation.

capabilities.title: Security Engineering
capabilities.description: Web and API security, network analysis, vulnerability assessment, and defensive security tooling.

projects.title: Anime Streaming Platform
projects.description: A modern streaming experience with a scalable backend, search-focused discovery, technical SEO, responsive playback surfaces, and globally optimized content delivery.

projects.title: MutasiOPS
projects.description: Enterprise financial mutation automation connected to multiple Android devices, built for high concurrency, real-time monitoring, reliable workflows, and efficient transaction processing.

projects.title: WebDok
projects.description: Digital bookkeeping and business management software with transaction workflows, financial reporting, user administration, operational analytics, and decision-ready dashboards.

projects.title: Automation & Security Tools
projects.description: A practical toolkit for infrastructure management: automation utilities, monitoring software, internal security research tools, OSINT workflows, and productivity systems.

projects.title: WA Blast Platform
projects.description: A WhatsApp broadcast and campaign management platform designed for bulk message delivery, contact segmentation, message scheduling, delivery monitoring, and scalable queue-based processing.

projects.title: PLTS Management System
projects.description: A solar power plant management system for monitoring operational data, managing assets and maintenance activities, analyzing performance, and presenting technical insights through centralized dashboards.

services.title: Product Engineering
services.description: Full-stack web products, enterprise applications, and interfaces built for real workflows.

services.title: Backend & APIs
services.description: High-performance services, REST APIs, integrations, queues, and real-time systems.

services.title: System Architecture
services.description: Technical discovery, domain modeling, database design, and scalable architecture.

services.title: Cloud & DevOps
services.description: Deployment, CI/CD, Linux infrastructure, observability, and performance tuning.

services.title: Automation
services.description: Web scraping, bots, browser automation, ADB orchestration, and task processing.

services.title: Optimization
services.description: Database profiling, caching strategy, bottleneck removal, and reliability upgrades.

services.title: Cybersecurity
services.description: Web and API security, network analysis, security research, and vulnerability assessment.

services.title: Technical Consulting
services.description: Architecture review, delivery planning, code review, and engineering leadership.

contact.title: Explore my work.
